news.t: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: CVIE is an equity ETF with a total of 754 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 5.55%, Samsung Electronics at 3.73%, SK hynix at 2.83%, ASML Holding at 2.30%, and Arm Holdings at 1.55%.

overview.description: The Calvert International Responsible Index ETF (CVIE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Calvert International Responsible index, a market-cap-weighted, ESG-screened index of large-cap stocks from the developed markets outside of the US CVIE was launched on Jan 30, 2023 and is issued by Morgan Stanley.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: Morgan Stanley MS +1.02% is expanding further into retail investing with its first exchange-traded funds, but faces a crowded field where legions of ETFs struggle to gain traction.
